statement: Rate-limit deferrals can produce prolonged pending churn because they do not consume request retry attempts.
rationale: Deferral updates next-at timestamps without incrementing attempts in current job/batch flows.
keyAssumptions: Provider limiter can remain constrained for long intervals
validationCriteria: Under forced limiter deny, attempts remain flat while next-at shifts repeatedly
System recovers once limiter opens without manual row surgery
critiquePoints: May be acceptable policy if bounded by scheduler health checks
questions: Should there be a deferral cap or aging-based escalation?
